column1: TKE GLP-1 Kidney Protection Clinic - Financial Pro Forma (TN Locality 35 GPCI-Adjusted)
REIMBURSEMENT RATES (APP BILLING - 85% of Physician for Medicare)
In TN Locality 35 (West Tennessee), E/M reimbursement is 15-20% below national Medicare averages.
RPM/CCM is NOT optional -- it is the financial engine that makes the clinic viable.
In the Strong Execution model, RPM/CCM generates 58-60% of total revenue.
Recommendation: Build RPM/CCM infrastructure from Day 1, not as a Phase 2 afterthought.
